questions.prompt: Which intermediate versions should we stop and test at?
How should we handle related dependency upgrades?
questions.description: vite-plugin-electron has a 0.x → 1.x major. electron-builder and native modules may need version bumps.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Upgrade deps only when they block compilation or tests.

options.label: Minimal: upgrade deps only when they block compilation or tests
Generous: also bump vite-plugin-electron, electron-builder, typescript to latest

questions.prompt: What's the verification gate at each stop?
questions.recommendedAnswer: TypeCheck + All unit tests pass + App launches

options.label: Above plus manual smoke test (click around, auto-tag an album)

questions.prompt: What if a stop blocks us (unfixable breakage)?
questions.recommendedAnswer: Skip the blocking version, try next. If two consecutive fail, revert to last known good and stop.

options.label: Skip the blocking version, try next
